_meta.note: Auto-generated from Dimbreath/ArknightsData (en-US, archived snapshot). Covers operators released up to the archive date only -- newer operators (e.g. Proviso, Tequila, Quartz, Pudding) are NOT included and must be added manually. combo_tags are hand-curated (keyed by buffId) only for operators referenced in combos.json; most operators have empty combo_tags (raw data only).

skills.name: Clue Search β
skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to the Reception Room, Clue search speed increases by 20%

skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to the Workshop to process Chips, the production rate of byproduct increases by 70%

skills.name: Neuroticism
skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to the Control Center, increases the likelihood of obtaining Clues corresponding to the factions of Operators assigned to the Reception Room, but greatly increases the Morale consumption of Operators assigned to the Control Center

skills.name: Surgical Precision
skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to be the Trainer in the Training Room, Medic Operators' Specialization training speed +60%

skills.name: Secret Inquiry
skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to the Reception Room, increases the likelihood of obtaining Ursus Student Self-Governing Group clues (Working time affects the likelihood).

skills.name: Screening
skills.effect: When this Operator is assigned to the Reception Room, increases the likelihood of obtaining Ursus Student Self-Governing Group clues for every newly-obtained clue that is not from Ursus Student Self-Governing Group (Working time affects the likelihood).
